name: linGetSyncBreakLength
title: linGetSyncBreakLength
description: This function can be used to retrieve the sync break (dominant bits) length of a LIN bus event. The resulting length is in units of 10 µsec (microseconds). To get the result in bit times linTime2Bits() function can be used.

parameters.name: busEvent
parameters.description: LIN bus event of type frame, checksum error, receive error, transmission error, synchronization error or wakeup signal.

return: Returns the retrieved length [in units of 10 µsec] or 0 on failure.

description: Analyze receive error event by retrieving length of sync break and sync delimiter
